# Deadline Policy Requirements Checklist: Time Limit for Dropping from a Class

**Purpose**: Validate requirement quality for deadline display, enforcement, and
error handling  
**Created**: 2026-03-14  
**Feature**: [/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/015-drop-time-limit/spec.md](/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/015-drop-time-limit/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based
on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are deadline display requirements defined for all relevant student entry points? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 Are timezone and canonical deadline source requirements fully specified? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK003 Are before-deadline and after-deadline outcome requirements both explicit and distinct? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK004 Are failure-mode requirements for deadline retrieval/evaluation complete? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-008]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is strict cutoff semantics around exact deadline timestamp unambiguous? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK006 Is the "clear policy explanation" expectation specific enough for consistent implementation? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "cannot confirm deadline" messaging intent sufficiently precise for user understanding? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK008 Do user stories and FR statements consistently define allow/block decisions across time windows? [Consistency, Spec §User Stories, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK009 Do edge-case statements align with strict no-grace policy requirements? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK010 Are UC-15 references consistent across stories, requirements, and success criteria? [Consistency, Spec §User Stories, Spec §FR-010]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK011 Are success criteria measurable for before-deadline, after-deadline, and error scenarios? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-002, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK012 Is eligibility visibility timing target objectively verifiable? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]

## Scenario and Edge-Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK013 Are all scenario classes (main-before, main-after, extension-error) represented at requirement level? [Coverage, Spec §User Stories]
- [ ] CHK014 Are timezone mismatch and exact-cutoff boundary conditions explicitly addressed? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK015 Is missing deadline configuration behavior explicitly represented as a safe block? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Dependencies and Assumptions

- [ ] CHK016 Are term-calendar dependency and update assumptions documented for planning/test design? [Dependency, Gap]
- [ ] CHK017 Are traceability requirements to UC-15 and UC-15-AS explicit as quality gates? [Traceability, Spec §FR-010]

## Notes

- Focus areas selected: Policy enforcement quality, boundary-condition clarity,
  and failure safety.
- Depth level: Standard (recommended default applied).
- Actor/timing: Reviewer during planning and PR review.
